Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Override Irradiance Volume Local Light Scale
Fields.Description: Local light scale value at the time of IV shooting (0 or less - no overwrite) [GR] SEQ13338 [Irradiance volume] I want to change the indirect scale of the SFX light source uniformly.
